final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: high-end fashion editorial, commercial photography
Primary request: minimalist fashion editorial of a model wearing a structured white gown in a seamless white studio
Scene/backdrop: seamless white cyclorama studio, pure white paper backdrop, no props or distractions
Subject: elegant female model standing in 45-degree profile, chin slightly lifted, fierce confident gaze, wearing architectural white structural gown with exaggerated shoulder construction, cinched waist, A-line skirt
Style/medium: commercial fashion photography, Helmut Newton aesthetic reference, high contrast, sharp and crisp
Composition/framing: medium shot, 45-degree angle pose, clean negative space around subject
Lighting/mood: butterfly lighting setup, key light from 45-degree overhead, strong highlight and shadow contrast, sculptural dimensionality
Color palette: monochromatic black-white-gray, deep crimson red lips as sole accent
Materials/textures: crisp architectural fabric with structural folds, matte white surface, sharp tailoring
Constraints: preserve the dramatic shoulder silhouette and A-line skirt structure, maintain Helmut Newton high-contrast aesthetic
Avoid: soft lighting, pastel colors, cluttered background, warm tones, deformed hands, plastic skin texture
